banjaraHillsPage.cosmeticTitle: Cosmetic surgery services in Banjara Hills
banjaraHillsPage.cosmeticSubtitle: A broad range of aesthetic procedures designed to enhance appearance, restore confidence, and align outcomes with each patient's anatomy and goals.

cosmeticServices.title: Rhinoplasty (Nose Reshaping)
cosmeticServices.description: Rhinoplasty refines the size, shape, and symmetry of the nose to improve appearance and, where needed, breathing function. Open and closed rhinoplasty techniques are selected based on anatomy and the desired outcome.

cosmeticServices.title: Breast Augmentation
cosmeticServices.description: Breast augmentation enhances breast volume and contour using carefully selected implants or fat transfer techniques, with planning tailored to the patient's frame and preferences.

cosmeticServices.title: Breast Reduction
cosmeticServices.description: Breast reduction surgery reduces excess volume to relieve neck, shoulder, and back discomfort while also reshaping and lifting the breast for a proportionate result.

cosmeticServices.title: Tummy Tuck (Abdominoplasty)
cosmeticServices.description: A tummy tuck removes excess abdominal skin and tightens weakened or separated abdominal muscles, which is especially helpful after major weight loss or pregnancy.

cosmeticServices.title: Liposuction and Body Contouring
cosmeticServices.description: Liposuction targets stubborn fat deposits in areas such as the abdomen, flanks, thighs, arms, and chin to create a smoother, more contoured silhouette.

cosmeticServices.title: Gynecomastia Reduction
cosmeticServices.description: Gynecomastia surgery removes excess glandular tissue and fat through minimally visible incisions to restore a flatter, more masculine chest contour.

cosmeticServices.title: Facial Rejuvenation and Non-Surgical Treatments
cosmeticServices.description: For subtle enhancement without surgery, Botox and dermal fillers can soften lines, restore volume, and refine facial contours with minimal downtime.

banjaraHillsPage.reconstructiveSubtitle: Reconstructive plastic surgery focuses on restoring form and function after trauma, cancer treatment, burns, or congenital conditions with technically precise and compassionate care.

reconstructiveServices.title: Onco Reconstruction
reconstructiveServices.description: Following cancer surgery, including breast, oral, and skin cancer resections, reconstruction helps restore appearance and, wherever possible, normal function through coordinated surgical planning.

reconstructiveServices.title: Breast Reconstruction
reconstructiveServices.description: Breast reconstruction rebuilds the breast mound after mastectomy or lumpectomy using implant-based or autologous tissue techniques, including flap procedures where appropriate.

reconstructiveServices.title: Trauma Reconstruction
reconstructiveServices.description: Complex wounds, fractures, and soft-tissue defects following trauma often require expert reconstructive surgery to restore both function and form over the long term.

reconstructiveServices.title: Hand Surgery
reconstructiveServices.description: Hand surgery addresses tendon injuries, nerve damage, fractures, congenital hand differences, and other conditions that affect grip, dexterity, and sensation.

reconstructiveServices.title: Microvascular Surgery
reconstructiveServices.description: Microvascular free-flap surgery transfers living tissue with its blood supply from one part of the body to another for reconstruction of complex defects.

reconstructiveServices.title: Burn Reconstruction and Scar Revision
reconstructiveServices.description: Burn injuries can leave contractures, hypertrophic scars, and functional impairment that may require staged procedures such as skin grafting, tissue expansion, and scar revision.
reconstructiveServices.cta: Learn about Burn and Scar Revision

banjaraHillsPage.aigTitle: Why consult at AIG Hospitals, Banjara Hills?
banjaraHillsPage.aigSubtitle: Hospital infrastructure, accessibility, peri-operative support, and diagnostic access are key advantages for patients consulting in Banjara Hills.

aigBenefits.title: NABH-accredited facility
aigBenefits.description: AIG Hospitals meets national standards for patient safety, hygiene, and clinical quality.

aigBenefits.title: Advanced OT infrastructure
aigBenefits.description: State-of-the-art operation theatres support complex plastic, reconstructive, and microsurgical procedures.

aigBenefits.title: Dedicated ICU and post-op care
aigBenefits.description: A multidisciplinary team and high-dependency care support recovery after major surgery.

aigBenefits.title: Convenient Banjara Hills location
aigBenefits.description: The hospital is easily accessible from Jubilee Hills, Kondapur, Madhapur, Gachibowli, and surrounding areas.

aigBenefits.title: Comprehensive diagnostics
aigBenefits.description: On-site imaging, pathology, and pre-operative assessment help streamline surgical planning.

aigBenefits.title: Insurance and cashless support
aigBenefits.description: Eligible reconstructive procedures may be covered through major insurance providers, subject to plan terms.

faqItems.question: What is the consultation fee for Dr. Divya Sai Narsingam at AIG Hospitals, Banjara Hills?
faqItems.answer: Consultation fees may vary. Please call +91 99001 35489 or contact AIG Hospitals, Banjara Hills directly to confirm the current consultation charge.

faqItems.question: What is the recovery time after plastic surgery?
faqItems.answer: Recovery depends on the procedure. Non-surgical treatments usually involve minimal downtime, smaller procedures may take a few days, and major surgeries such as tummy tuck, breast reconstruction, or microvascular surgery may take several weeks.

faqItems.question: Does Dr. Divya Sai Narsingam perform both cosmetic and reconstructive surgery?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Care spans cosmetic procedures such as rhinoplasty, liposuction, breast surgery, and body contouring, along with reconstructive care including onco reconstruction, trauma reconstruction, hand surgery, microvascular surgery, and burn reconstruction.

faqItems.question: How do I book an appointment with the plastic surgeon at AIG Hospitals, Banjara Hills?
faqItems.answer: Appointments can be requested by calling +91 99001 35489, emailing drdivyaplasticsurgeon@gmail.com, or using the online appointment form. Consultation hours are Monday to Saturday, 4:00 PM to 5:00 PM.

faqItems.question: Is plastic surgery covered by health insurance?
faqItems.answer: Reconstructive procedures such as trauma repair, burn reconstruction, hand surgery, and cancer reconstruction are often more likely to qualify for coverage than purely cosmetic procedures. Final eligibility depends on your insurance policy.

faqItems.question: Can I choose a non-surgical aesthetic treatment instead of surgery?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Botox and dermal fillers may be suitable for selected concerns involving fine lines, volume loss, and facial contour refinement without surgery.

banjaraHillsPage.ctaTitle: Consult Dr. Divya Sai Narsingam at AIG Hospitals, Banjara Hills
banjaraHillsPage.ctaSummary: Use the contact page, WhatsApp, or phone to request an appointment. Consultation hours are Monday to Saturday, 4:00 PM to 5:00 PM.

about.heading: About Dr. Divya Sai Narsingam
about.summary: Dr. Divya Sai Narsingam is a board-certified Plastic and Reconstructive Surgeon with over 14 years of clinical experience, including 9 years as a specialist. She is currently practicing as a Consultant at CARE Hospitals, Gachibowli, Hyderabad. She is known for delivering safe, natural-looking results in both aesthetic and reconstructive plastic surgery, combining surgical precision with compassionate care.

about.bio: Dr. Divya Sai Narsingam is a board-certified Plastic and Reconstructive Surgeon with over 14 years of clinical experience, including 9 years as a specialist. She is currently practicing as a Consultant at CARE Hospitals, Gachibowli, Hyderabad. She is known for delivering safe, natural-looking results in both aesthetic and reconstructive plastic surgery, combining surgical precision with compassionate care.
about.philosophy: Surgery is as much about listening as it is about operating. Every patient brings a unique story, unique anatomy, and unique expectations. My role is to understand that story fully — and then use every tool at my disposal to help write a better chapter.

services.content: Oncoplastic and reconstructive surgery following tumor resection in breast, head and neck, skin, and soft tissue cancers. Dr. Narsingam works closely with oncology teams to plan resection margins and simultaneous or staged reconstruction, restoring both function and appearance.
key_points: Immediate and delayed breast reconstruction post-mastectomy
Skin and soft tissue coverage after wide local excision
Head and neck reconstruction following tumour removal
Coordination with oncosurgery teams for optimal outcomes

faq.question: Who is a good candidate for Onco Reconstruction?
faq.answer: Surgical restoration following cancer resection, preserving function and form. A detailed consultation is required to confirm suitability and treatment plan.

faq.question: What does Onco Reconstruction typically include?
faq.answer: Immediate and delayed breast reconstruction post-mastectomy Skin and soft tissue coverage after wide local excision Head and neck reconstruction following tumour removal Coordination with oncosurgery teams for optimal outcomes

services.name: Breast Reconstruction
services.summary: Restoring breast shape and symmetry after mastectomy or lumpectomy.
services.content: Breast reconstruction is a deeply personal procedure that restores the breast mound following mastectomy or significant lumpectomy. Options include implant-based reconstruction, autologous tissue reconstruction using flaps (TRAM, DIEP, LD), and oncoplastic techniques that combine cancer resection with volume replacement.
key_points: Implant-based (tissue expander to implant) reconstruction
Autologous flap reconstruction (LD, TRAM)
Nipple and areola reconstruction
Symmetry correction of the opposite breast

faq.question: Who is a good candidate for Breast Reconstruction?
faq.answer: Restoring breast shape and symmetry after mastectomy or lumpectomy. A detailed consultation is required to confirm suitability and treatment plan.

faq.question: What does Breast Reconstruction typically include?
faq.answer: Implant-based (tissue expander to implant) reconstruction Autologous flap reconstruction (LD, TRAM) Nipple and areola reconstruction Symmetry correction of the opposite breast

faq.question: Where is Breast Reconstruction performed?

services.name: Trauma Reconstruction
services.summary: Restoring tissue and function following accidents, burns, or injuries.
services.content: Traumatic wounds — whether from road accidents, industrial injuries, burns, or degloving — often require complex reconstructive approaches. Dr. Narsingam specialises in acute wound management, skin grafting, local and regional flap coverage, and staged reconstruction to restore function and minimise deformity.
key_points: Acute traumatic wound management
Split-thickness and full-thickness skin grafting
Local and pedicled flap coverage
Burn contracture release and resurfacing

faq.question: Who is a good candidate for Trauma Reconstruction?
faq.answer: Restoring tissue and function following accidents, burns, or injuries. A detailed consultation is required to confirm suitability and treatment plan.

services.name: Hand Surgery
services.summary: Reconstructive and functional surgery of the hand and upper extremity.
services.content: The hand is one of the most complex and functionally critical parts of the body. Hand surgery addresses traumatic injuries (tendon, nerve, and vessel lacerations), congenital anomalies, infections, and functional deficits following crush injuries or replantation.
key_points: Tendon repair and reconstruction
Nerve repair and grafting
Fingertip and composite tissue injuries
Post-traumatic hand rehabilitation planning

faq.question: Who is a good candidate for Hand Surgery?
faq.answer: Reconstructive and functional surgery of the hand and upper extremity. A detailed consultation is required to confirm suitability and treatment plan.

faq.question: What does Hand Surgery typically include?
faq.answer: Tendon repair and reconstruction Nerve repair and grafting Fingertip and composite tissue injuries Post-traumatic hand rehabilitation planning

services.name: Microvascular Surgery
services.summary: Free flap tissue transfer using operating microscope for complex reconstruction.
services.content: Microvascular surgery involves the transfer of tissue — skin, muscle, or bone — from one part of the body to another, using tiny blood vessel anastomoses performed under a surgical microscope. This technique allows reconstruction of complex defects where simpler methods are inadequate.
key_points: Free flap transfer for head, neck, and limb defects
Perforator flap design and harvest
Anastomosis under surgical microscopy
Postoperative flap monitoring and salvage

faq.question: Who is a good candidate for Microvascular Surgery?
faq.answer: Free flap tissue transfer using operating microscope for complex reconstruction. A detailed consultation is required to confirm suitability and treatment plan.

services.name: Maxillofacial Trauma
services.summary: Surgical management of facial bone fractures and soft tissue injuries.
services.content: Maxillofacial trauma encompasses injuries to the bones and soft tissues of the face — including orbital fractures, nasal fractures, mandibular fractures, and complex panfacial injuries. Timely and accurate repair restores normal facial contour, occlusion, and eye protection.
key_points: Orbital floor and rim fracture repair
Nasal bone and septal fracture reduction
Mandibular fracture open reduction and fixation
Soft tissue laceration repair and scar management

faq.answer: Surgical management of facial bone fractures and soft tissue injuries. A detailed consultation is required to confirm suitability and treatment plan.

services.name: Facial Plastic Surgery
services.summary: Reconstructive and aesthetic procedures of the face and facial structures.
services.content: Facial plastic surgery encompasses both reconstructive procedures — scar revision, correction of post-traumatic deformity, eyelid surgery — and aesthetic enhancements performed with natural results as the priority. Every facial procedure is tailored to the individual's anatomy and goals.
key_points: Scar revision and resurfacing
Blepharoplasty (eyelid correction)
Rhinoplasty (nose reshaping)
Ear correction (otoplasty)

services.name: Breast Augmentation
services.summary: Enhancing breast volume and shape using implants or fat transfer.
services.content: Breast augmentation increases breast size and improves symmetry using silicone gel or cohesive implants placed in a precise surgical pocket. Dr. Narsingam takes a conservative, patient-centred approach — the goal is a natural, proportionate outcome that suits the individual's frame.
key_points: Silicone gel implant selection and sizing
Submuscular and dual-plane placement
Scar minimisation with inframammary or periareolar incisions
Fat transfer augmentation for modest size change

faq.question: Who is a good candidate for Breast Augmentation?
faq.answer: Enhancing breast volume and shape using implants or fat transfer. A detailed consultation is required to confirm suitability and treatment plan.

services.name: Breast Reduction
services.summary: Reducing breast size to relieve physical symptoms and improve proportions.
services.content: Symptomatic macromastia — neck pain, back pain, skin rashes, and restricted activity — is a genuine medical condition. Breast reduction surgery removes excess glandular tissue, fat, and skin, reshaping the breast to a comfortable, proportionate size while preserving sensation and, where possible, breastfeeding ability.
key_points: Vertical and Wise-pattern reduction techniques
Preservation of nipple sensation and blood supply
Simultaneous uplift (mastopexy) as needed
Significant improvement in posture and quality of life

faq.question: Who is a good candidate for Breast Reduction?
faq.answer: Reducing breast size to relieve physical symptoms and improve proportions. A detailed consultation is required to confirm suitability and treatment plan.

services.name: Breast Lift (Mastopexy)
services.summary: Lifting and reshaping the breasts for a firmer, more youthful contour.
services.content: A breast lift reshapes and elevates the breast tissue to restore a higher position and improved contour. The procedure can be tailored to mild or significant droop, and may be combined with augmentation or reduction depending on goals.
key_points: Restores breast position and improves contour
Repositions the nipple-areola complex
Can be combined with augmentation or reduction
Scar pattern tailored to the degree of ptosis

services.name: Rhinoplasty
services.summary: Refining nasal shape and proportion while preserving breathing function.
services.content: Rhinoplasty balances nasal shape with facial proportions while maintaining or improving nasal airflow. Surgical planning considers the bridge, tip, and nostrils, with techniques chosen to deliver natural-looking results.
key_points: Shape refinement for bridge, tip, and nostrils
Functional assessment of the nasal airway
Open or closed technique based on anatomy
Natural, balanced facial proportions

services.name: Tummy Tuck (Abdominoplasty)
services.summary: Removing excess abdominal skin and tightening the abdominal wall.
services.content: Abdominoplasty addresses excess skin and fat in the abdomen — a concern commonly following significant weight loss or post-pregnancy changes. The procedure tightens the rectus muscles if diastasis (separation) exists, removes the lower abdominal apron, and repositions the umbilicus for a smooth, firm contour.
key_points: Full, mini, and extended abdominoplasty options
Rectus muscle plication for diastasis repair
Combined with liposuction for optimal contouring
Low, concealable scar placement

services.name: Body Lipocontouring
services.summary: Precise fat removal and reshaping of body contours through liposuction.
services.content: Lipocontouring uses tumescent liposuction to selectively remove stubborn fat deposits that are resistant to diet and exercise. It is a body sculpting procedure — not a weight loss treatment — and works best when performed with attention to the body's natural curves and proportions.
key_points: Abdomen, flanks, thighs, arms, and neck
Tumescent technique for safety and precision
High-definition contouring where appropriate
Fat transfer (lipofilling) to areas needing volume

services.name: Gynecomastia Reduction
services.summary: Surgical correction of enlarged male breast tissue for a flatter chest.
services.content: Gynecomastia — the development of glandular breast tissue in males — can cause significant psychological distress. After excluding hormonal or pharmacological causes, surgical treatment combines glandular excision with liposuction to achieve a flat, masculine chest contour.
key_points: Thorough endocrine and pharmacological workup
Glandular excision via periareolar incision
Liposuction for adipose component
Skin tightening for severe cases with skin excess

faq.answer: Surgical correction of enlarged male breast tissue for a flatter chest. A detailed consultation is required to confirm suitability and treatment plan.
